sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106728" key="u(mnologi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμνο-λογίζω</orth>, <sense id="n106728.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-λογέω</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.Cap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope> </bibl> (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">γυμν</itype>-codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
